<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "4, ['Request for user’s exact date of birth (explicit personal data, not a yes/no flag as in birth_date_needed)', 'Reference to Premium Insurance Membership (€20/month) discount program (membership/loyalty concept not in template)', 'Gym Membership Reimbursement (€300/month) as a standalone paid add-on (template only supports yes/no for gym_reimbursement, not costed add-ons)', 'Add-ons such as Wellness Programs (€200/month) or Preventive Care Package (€150/month) as priced extras (template supports yes/no flags but not priced add-ons)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['Health insurance plan options with plan_name, plan_type=health_physical and health_mental, monthly_cost, coverage_tier, deductible_amount, telemedicine_included, wellness_programs_included, etc.', 'Property insurance coverage with luxury_items_covered, electronics_coverage, home protection, coverage_limit', 'Travel insurance coverage with adventure_sports_covered, medical_evacuation, emergency_support, baggage_protection', 'Quality ratings for each plan mapped to quality_rating', 'Deductible percentages and zero-deductible info mapped to deductible_percentage', 'Global 24/7 support mapped to emergency_support=24/7 and global_coverage=yes', 'Claims processing time (5–10 days) mapped to claims_processing_time', 'Geographic location inquiry (country/city) mapped to geographic_coverage.primary_residence_country and city', 'Request for age bracket confirmation mapped to family_coverage.primary_holder_age or policy_timeline.age_out_date', 'Adventure and sports protection mapped to travel_insurance_specific.adventure_sports_covered=yes', 'Property smart home coverage mapped to property_insurance_specific.electronics_coverage=yes', 'Preventive care mapped to health_insurance_specific.preventive_care_covered=yes', 'Mental health programs and crisis intervention mapped to health_insurance_specific.stress_management_programs and crisis_intervention', 'Proposal presentation of multiple insurance bundle options mapped under communication_type=proposal_presentation']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Request for user’s exact date of birth (explicit personal data, not a yes/no flag as in birth_date_needed)', 'Reference to Premium Insurance Membership (€20/month) discount program (membership/loyalty concept not in template)', 'Gym Membership Reimbursement (€300/month) as a standalone paid add-on (template only supports yes/no for gym_reimbursement, not costed add-ons)', 'Add-ons such as Wellness Programs (€200/month) or Preventive Care Package (€150/month) as priced extras (template supports yes/no flags but not priced add-ons)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['Health insurance plan options with plan_name, plan_type=health_physical and health_mental, monthly_cost, coverage_tier, deductible_amount, telemedicine_included, wellness_programs_included, etc.', 'Property insurance coverage with luxury_items_covered, electronics_coverage, home protection, coverage_limit', 'Travel insurance coverage with adventure_sports_covered, medical_evacuation, emergency_support, baggage_protection', 'Quality ratings for each plan mapped to quality_rating', 'Deductible percentages and zero-deductible info mapped to deductible_percentage', 'Global 24/7 support mapped to emergency_support=24/7 and global_coverage=yes', 'Claims processing time (5–10 days) mapped to claims_processing_time', 'Geographic location inquiry (country/city) mapped to geographic_coverage.primary_residence_country and city', 'Request for age bracket confirmation mapped to family_coverage.primary_holder_age or policy_timeline.age_out_date', 'Adventure and sports protection mapped to travel_insurance_specific.adventure_sports_covered=yes', 'Property smart home coverage mapped to property_insurance_specific.electronics_coverage=yes', 'Preventive care mapped to health_insurance_specific.preventive_care_covered=yes', 'Mental health programs and crisis intervention mapped to health_insurance_specific.stress_management_programs and crisis_intervention', 'Proposal presentation of multiple insurance bundle options mapped under communication_type=proposal_presentation']
